data.title: Audit and document .skogai directory structure
data.description:
Go through each .skogai subdirectory, understand its purpose, and document findings.

Directories to audit:

- [ ] knowledge/
- [ ] memory/
- [ ] templates/
- [ ] tools/
- [ ] workflows/
- [ ] scripts/
- [ ] plan/
- [ ] state/
- [ ] todos/ (vs tasks/ - clarify relationship)
- [ ] projects/
- [ ] email/
- [ ] docs/

For each: understand what it contains, how it should be used, and whether it needs symlinks or integration with other tooling.
